message:
fix: v1.2.3 — fix deprecated tempfile::into_path for nightly clippy

Replace TempDir::into_path() with keep() to satisfy nightly clippy
deprecation lint. Bump fsfs 1.2.2 → 1.2.3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-fsfs"
-version = "1.2.2"
+version = "1.2.3"
 description = "Standalone fsfs CLI for two-tier hybrid local search"
 edition.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
